summary: Iteration 4 (futuristic AI-centric rebuild with AIOrb + MeshBackground + Particles + CommandSpotlight) verified end-to-end. Backend 4/4 (root, health, config, 404). Frontend webpack compile clean ('No issues found'). Landing renders with the dark cinematic theme, near-black background, mesh blobs visible, h1 'An HR brain,' + gradient 'that knows yours.', AI Orb centered with 1 .ai-orb container + 1 .ai-orb-core + 3 .ai-orb-ring (matches the multi-layer spec), and floating capability cards 'Voice-native', 'Region-aware', 'Source-cited', 'Human escalation' on the right with holo-border. Pillars section 'Built on four pillars.' renders 4 cards. CTA section 'Plug it in. Light it up.' with steps 01/02/03 confirmed. At 390x844 mobile, document.documentElement.scrollWidth == 390 → NO horizontal overflow. Sign-in (/sign-in) still renders the hybrid light+dark form layout. Direct nav to /app/dashboard while unauthenticated correctly redirects to /sign-in. /this-does-not-exist shows the 404 page. ZERO console errors captured during the entire walkthrough.
action_items: (Optional) The LandingPage uses useEffect to toggle the 'dark' class on <html> — works on mount, but a quick JS eval before mount returned classList.contains('dark') === False. The page is visually dark in screenshots (MeshBackground paints near-black) so this is cosmetic only. If you ever rely on Tailwind 'dark:' utility classes at SSR / first paint, prefer setting the class synchronously (e.g. inline script in index.html or before-paint useLayoutEffect).
Chat AI is still MOCKED (no n8n webhook configured) — flagged in iteration 3 too. When the n8n webhook is plugged in, retest the /app/chat?q=... handoff from CommandSpotlight.

Authenticated walkthroughs (/app/dashboard 'AI Command Center', intent chips, conversation stream, live alerts ping) still blocked by missing Supabase RLS migration / seeded users. Once seeded, drive a logged-in test to verify the AIOrb (size 340) hero, HUD strips, and asymmetric 3+2 grid render at 1920px.
critical_code_review_comments: AIOrb attaches a global mousemove listener with no throttling (rAF). On orb-heavy routes this fires hundreds of times per second and writes two CSS vars per event. Consider throttling via requestAnimationFrame or pointer-events check to reduce repaint cost on lower-end devices.

AIOrb's mousemove listener correctly cleans up on unmount — good. But it also runs on touch devices where there is no cursor; consider gating with matchMedia('(pointer: fine)') to skip work on mobile.

LandingPage uses useEffect to add 'dark' class to <html> on mount and removes it on unmount. There is a brief first-paint flash where the class is not yet applied. If any child uses Tailwind 'dark:' utilities it could flash. Today the page uses explicit text-white + dark backgrounds inline so no flash is visible, but worth a useLayoutEffect to be safe.
MeshBackground (4 blobs + grid + grain + vignette + scanlines) is heavy. Confirm it is mounted only on routes that need it (Landing + AppShell) and not duplicated on the auth pages.
Particles renders count=40 CSS motes via JSX — ensure each has a unique key and that animation uses transform/opacity only (composited) to avoid jank. Quick spot-check in DevTools recommended.
CommandSpotlight: when the user submits, ensure the query is URI-encoded before pushing to /app/chat?q=... to prevent XSS / route-break on special characters.
Backend remains minimal (3 endpoints + 404) — no review notes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (12/12 functional checks: H1 text, dark theme visual, .ai-orb + core + 3 rings, 4 capability cards, 4 pillars, CTA heading, steps 01/02/03, mobile 390 no overflow, sign-in renders, dashboard guard redirect, 404 page, zero console errors)

test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md not present. Not required for this iteration — only public pages, route guards, and backend health were in scope (per agent_to_agent_context_note, authenticated walkthrough is skipped).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 dark AI-centric rebuild verified clean. /api/, /api/health, /api/config, 404 all PASS. Landing dark theme + AIOrb + capability cards + pillars + CTA + mobile responsive (390 no overflow) all verified. Public pages compile + render with zero console errors. To extend in iteration 5: (a) once Supabase migration is applied and a seeded employee user exists, log in and visit /app/dashboard to verify the new 'AI Command Center' layout — AIOrb size 340 centerpiece, time-of-day-aware greeting on left-aligned-right, live HUD stats on right, asymmetric 3+2 grid with conversation stream + live alerts pulse-ping, top/bottom HUD strips ('assistant · online · timezone · v1.0.0' and 'rag online · region scoped · voice ready'), intent chips (Apply leave / Payslip / Benefits / WFH / Policies), and CommandSpotlight typewriter cycling through 5 prompts. (b) Verify CommandSpotlight submit navigates to /app/chat?q=<encoded>. (c) Wire n8n webhook and verify the chat response stream is no longer mocked. (d) Spot-check AIOrb parallax-tilt on mousemove on a fast machine and confirm no jank. (e) Test at 2560px (4xl breakpoint) to confirm 3xl:text-8xl typography scaling. Backend remains 3 endpoints + 404 — no new tests needed unless new endpoints are added.
rca of the issue: No issues identified — clean iteration 4 pass on all 12 required checks + 4 backend tests.
